title: JSON Schema validation core and custom-keyword extension point
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 5.1-5.2.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] The jsonschema crate (~0.46, Draft 2020-12) validates a projection against a rule's JSON Schema.
- [hard] Compiled schemas are cached (compiled once per rule, lazily), never recompiled per write.
- [hard] Findings carry rule name, severity, and message.
- [hard] The validator is the fan-in for desugaring and graph rules; it does NOT include the deferred custom-keyword API (separate task 33f23ec7).
